steps.title: Read two boundary points
steps.content: The boundary line is where $rx+ty=-77$. From the graph, two clear points on that line are $(0,-11)$ and $(-7,-10)$.

steps.title: Use the points to find r and t
Answer
steps.content: The question asks for $r+t$, not the inequality direction. Since $r+t=8$, A is correct.
